analysis_summary.en: 1. 【Narrative Check】Current news is neutral; Trump tariff news partially digested, Bitcoin miner AI acquisition and whale accumulation provide support, but market remains in Extreme Fear (index 8.0), suggesting negatives may be priced in. 2. Daily trends are fully bearish (BTC/ETH/SOL/BNB/DOGE all below SMA50), but 【Pain Trade】 detection shows: DOGE funding Z-score at 107% (long squeeze risk), SOL negative funding (Z-score -4.5%) offers potential short squeeze opportunity. 3. I select the 【Microstructure Squeeze】 scenario, going long on SOL with negative funding + price resilience (neutral RSI), while managing existing position risks.
